horoscope: You're seeking the familiar and comfortable today, dear Aries, and grounding and earthy activities are a strong draw. The simpler things in life are appealing, but you're also active and engaged. Today’s energies are great for organizing your space or finding ways to get yourself on solid footing. Transits may energize a brewing matter related to making money or, on an emotional level, respect, and they fuel your enthusiasm for making yourself more secure. Later today, people may not mesh well temporarily, even if they want to cooperate with one another. Aim to stay in the moment and examine insecurities if current experiences seem to activate them.

Energetic activity might help you work through frustrations today, dear Taurus, and they can be especially refreshing now. You have an especially electric, exciting aura around you today, with the Moon in your sign all day and meeting Mars. Personal plans can get a boost, either due to increased motivation to pursue them or to opportunities opening for you.  You have more courage and energy, and self-directed activities seem best right now since you're more independent than usual. Still, later today, we approach a Venus-Chiron square, and desires can be misleading temporarily. Avoid letting your own insecurities cloud your vision of someone else. Consider that you may not be seeing people and possibly even things for their true value, but it's temporary.

The Moon spends all day in your solar sector of privacy and rest, dear Gemini, meeting energetic Mars there. You can make interesting discoveries about your inner or private world, which can be motivating. You may have a little more courage than usual to put a problem behind you. You could be craving either a break from the past or a reconnection with it! Mars has been working its way through this area of your solar chart, stirring up previously buried anger, desire, and passion in recent weeks, and can be working under the radar much of the time. Effectively, today's emotional Moon engaging with Mars can spur feelings that take you by surprise if you're not in touch with its energies. Watch for a tendency to work against yourself now, since this is a time when a lot is going on under the hood. Later today, timing can be off in small ways, so consider taking care of important business another day. Decision-making about purchases and relationships, especially, should probably wait.

Today's Moon and its alignment with Mars activate your social life or your feelings about your happiness pursuits, dear Cancer. The Moon's harmony with Mercury also helps you state your case, express your ideas, and share your plans. Others are finding you particularly interesting, and you’re especially persuasive. It’s a good time to help someone solve a problem. Networking, friendships, or group activities can stir up many feelings. You can also be especially motivated by and excited about new long-term plans. Venus in your sign tends to put you in a good light, but later today, as Venus approaches a square to Chiron, you could find that there are misunderstandings or your timing is off. Expressing your desires or frustrations can come across the wrong way at the moment, but it's temporary. Slight tweaks and adjustments may be necessary if you're looking to get something you want. Avoid the temptation to over-explain and opt instead to let your actions do the most talking!

Your ideas are in a developmental stage these days, dear Leo, and you intuitively sense that you shouldn’t share them until they (and you) are ready with both Mercury and Venus in the sign just behind yours. Venus will enter your sign tomorrow. Today, meeting your responsibilities is important for emotional satisfaction with the Moon in your solar tenth house all day, and it’s best to make room for both serious and whimsical ideas. Still, with the Moon and Mars aligning today, you may be taking the lead or pushing something ahead. Things may be heating up in your career or with authority figures. Aim to draw upon the strength of your feelings to be productive and take the initiative. Later today, you can be quite sensitive to off rhythms, poor timing, and subtle changes, perhaps reading a little too much into what others are saying or might be thinking. It may be difficult to pinpoint the reason for discontent. Old issues that you thought you had buried might emerge and occupy your mind, however. Part of you wants to get involved, and another part doesn't, but wait things out if you can.

With today's transits, you can be inspired by the feedback you receive from sharing ideas, skills, talents, or knowledge with others, dear Virgo. Today's Moon encourages natural self-expression, but it also amps you up as it meets Mars. You’re connecting with your need for happiness, whether this is about a cause, a relationship, or personal interest. Getting fired up about a belief, adventure, or new learning experience is likely.  Later today, relationships might head into tricky territory as we approach a Venus-Chiron square, and it can be a toss-up whether they need extra attention to keep them running smoothly or if giving people space and avoiding overthinking problems is better. Friendly gestures may be taken the wrong way, something that's said can be misinterpreted, and other such minor social hiccups. Try not to take these things to heart, as it's temporary. While listening to your "inner voice" is generally a good idea, if it's laden with guilt, fear, or worry, then it's only going to stir up trouble. As such, work through insecurities and wait out important decision-making.

This can be an exciting day for making discoveries about your feelings or private life, dear Libra. There is much to absorb and take in, and you can be doing much in the way of problem-solving, list-making, and sorting things out. It's a time to uncover useful information and to boost your projects. Today's Moon-Mars alignment can activate frustrations over inequalities you've experienced, but it can also encourage and motivate you to act on an issue that has been a long time coming, particularly related to finances or intimacy. You might pour more of yourself into a pet project, interest, or research. Later today, however, people tend to require more care and sensitivity. There's a strong inclination for misunderstandings and resulting hurt feelings. However, it's a temporary dip, and current experiences can put you in closer touch with your insecurities.

Today's transits are strong for connecting with others, especially one-on-one, dear Scorpio, and for soaking in information. Opportunities to grow emotionally can be exciting. Others tend to encourage your faith in yourself and your future. Your interactions can be energetic and animated, and you might seek to feel vital and alive through your experiences with others. You want to put problems behind you and address problem areas directly rather than ignore them. There can be passion about partnering, or a person or relationship is highly motivating. Later today, energies are less straightforward as we approach a Venus-Chiron square. Avoid explaining yourself to people who are being narrow-minded, but take the time to make things right with those who deserve your attention. Dissatisfaction might resolve with a little time.

Today's Moon emphasizes your need to take care of details and routines, dear Sagittarius, and it vibes well with your special interest in conversations that are deeper and richer than the usual fare these days. You have a special eye for imbalances today, and you can accomplish a lot in bringing things back into order. Good energy is with you for investigations, and you're emotionally geared toward supporting and helping out the people around you, but you’re also unafraid of going your own way. You tend to approach your daily duties with added energy and motivation. Getting things done helps free up your mind. Later today, however, energies are less straightforward as we approach a Venus-Chiron square. People tend to be very indirect in their approach to getting what they want, and it can be difficult for you to find natural or easy outlets for your desires as well. Trying to explain your way out of something is likely to be a waste of time today. Rhythms in relationships can be off temporarily, but don't let this define your next move.

It's rather straightforward to enjoy an easy rapport with others, dear Capricorn. In the first half of the day, you're focusing on the similarities between you and the people in your life, and your differences entertain you more than frustrate you, helping you enjoy the day. The Moon spends all day in your entertainment sector, and you can feel inspired. Today is strong for creative and romantic energy. You're likely to feel impassioned, motivated, and confident. With your emotions and desire nature in tune today, your instincts seem to be sharp. However, as the day advances, we approach a Venus-Chiron square, and it becomes difficult to read or understand one another. Focusing on the past or responding habitually in ways that didn't bring you success in the past are to be avoided. Some introspection now can work wonders in helping you center yourself.

With today's Moon, your mood gets a boost from comforting and familiar activities, dear Aquarius. Your desire to slow down and nest continues, and it’s a good day for catching your breath on an emotional level. Still, you want to be active and involved, and you have strong energy to take care of business in your domestic world or to resolve a personal problem. You bring a fresh spirit and energy to your domestic life, and you're strongly motivated. Find a productive channel for this energy for the best results. Later today, however, it can be difficult to feel in sync, and it's hard to make satisfying decisions or plans without some feeling that you may be missing out elsewhere. As well, others' responses can be confusing. You might also be wrestling with issues of trust, but do consider that some of these feelings could be stemming from insecurities. Wait it out, as it's temporary.

People are responsive today, which can be motivating, dear Pisces. You see more options than usual, and possibilities seem to open up as a result. Even so, you may find yourself a few paces ahead of the people around you. You could make an interesting discovery in your studies or with your interests and projects, firing you up and fueling your motivation. Events or news now can excite your curiosity. There can be friendly competition stirring or a strong desire to put an idea into action. Later today, however, inner conflicts can lead to restlessness, making it difficult to make solid decisions you can fully get behind. You may not feel in sync with others on key issues. Watch for over-valuing something that doesn't deserve the attention, and for under-valuing what's totally worth your time.
